name: Hannah E.
title: I walked out feeling like myself
body: Léa understood exactly what I wanted from the first conversation. Not a magazine cover, just the best version of me.

name: James S.
title: Best balayage I have had in London
body: Hugo took the time to do it properly. Soft, lived-in, exactly what I asked for. I will not go anywhere else now.

name: Zoe W.
title: Calm, quiet, careful
body: By appointment only really means it. Never more than three guests in the salon and the team is unhurried with every one of us.

name: Leah W.
title: My bridal trial was perfect
body: Sofia is patient, kind and brilliant at her work. She made the morning feel calm in the middle of a chaotic week.

name: Zoe W.
title: Worth every penny
body: Salon-grade product, honest pricing, and a chair I do not have to chase. Already rebooked for the next cut.

name: Lucy S.
title: Finally a salon that listens
body: No upsell, no script. A real conversation before the foils went on. Result: lived-in colour that grew out beautifully.

name: Maya W.
title: My quietest hour of the month
body: Espresso on arrival, a stylist who knows my hair, and an hour that is genuinely mine. I look forward to my appointments.
